violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Employees have passed approved courses in food safety management. One employee must register with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Certified Food Safety Manager. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025

Molluscan Shellfish (clams) located in the small prep unit did not have the proper identification tags. Molluscan Shellstock tags must remain attached to the container in which the Molluscan Shellstock are received until the container is empty. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2025

Molluscan shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2025

Thermometers are lacking inside the refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025

Utensils observed displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets of all prep units and the inside walk-in cooler were observed in poor repair, split away from the doors. Gaskets must be replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025

Individual cutting boards (kitchen and bar) are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025
The ceiling in the kitchen is not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Ceiling is scheduled to be repaired. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

The cutting boards of the prep units are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2024
The doors to the restrooms are not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2024
Employee(s) observed changing gloves without washing their hands. Food employees must wash their hands before putting on gloves. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2023
Handsink at the bar is being used as a dump sink. Handsink can only be used for handwashing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2023

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2023
Ice used for drinks is stored on the same cold plate/bin as ice used to keep soda dispenser cold. Ice used for drinks must be separated. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2023

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. At the bar, the ice scoop was stored between 2 bottles of liquor. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/27/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets of the prep units were observed in poor repair. Gaskets are splitting away from the doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of black residue. In addition, pipes that run along the ceiling observed with grease, residue, and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2023
The door to the restrooms are not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
The ceiling in the kitchen is not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
